note: Personal note from clinic nurse — a general office message, not a reminder/request. Medical relationship: must NOT be autonomous.

input.rawContent:
From: nurse.amelia@littlesprout-pediatrics.ca
Subject: Following up on our call

Hi, just checking in after our chat yesterday about Baby Chen's feeding. Keep doing the smaller, more frequent feeds and let us know if the spit-up gets worse. No need to come in unless that changes. — Amelia, RN
